raw.subject: Paws & Claws Dog Grooming in Yakima; Ozzy and Sam's visit to Jen
raw.body:
Hi,

Your photos of happy dogs at Paws & Claws Dog Grooming in Yakima really caught my eye. Ozzy and Sam's visit to Jen looks like a great experience.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be making it harder for people to find and book your pet grooming services.

I sketched up a simple homepage idea using the photos and posts you already share on Facebook. It includes a hero section highlighting your professional pet care services, a photo gallery showcasing the happy dogs you care for, and a clear call-to-action to book grooming services.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/paws-claws-dog-grooming-yakima

Would love to discuss this further and get your thoughts. Building a professional website like this is a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. If you'd like to explore, I'd be happy to discuss details over a quick call or reply to this email.
